name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a sequence of length N where each element is either 0 (free) or the index of the philosopher holding it *)
(* States: a sequence of length N where each element is one of {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ /\ states' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF states[i] = "thinking" THEN "hungry" ELSE states[i]]
        /\ forks' = forks
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum, minNum

Init == /\ num = 0
      /\ flag = FALSE
      /\ maxNum = 0
      /\ minNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' = FALSE THEN num ELSE num' + 1
      /\ flag' = IF flag = FALSE THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
      /\ maxNum' = IF flag' = FALSE THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
      /\ minNum' = IF flag' = FALSE THEN minNum ELSE minNum' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxNum, minNum>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \land Len(q) = 0
       /\ head = 1
       /\ tail = 1
       /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
         /\ head \in 1..K
         /\ tail \in 1..K
         /\ count \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Set

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state


  state == "Candidate" -> 
    (* Candidate behavior *)
  state == "Leader" -> 
    (* Leader behavior *)
end
*)

(* State variables *)
currentTerm \in Nat
votedFor \in Set(Nat)
state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in Set(Nat)
  /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  (* Follower behavior *)
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ (* Follower actions: stay follower or become candidate *)
     (* For simplicity, we model a transition to Candidate *)
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm + 1}
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ (* Candidate actions: stay candidate or become leader *)
     (* For simplicity, we model a transition to Leader *)
     /\ state' = "Leader"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  \/ /\ state = "Leader"
     /\ state' = "Leader"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = <<>>

SendChunk ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0

Retransmit ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(channel))
    /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

DropChunk ==
    /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in channel : 
        /\ \E action \in {SendChunk, Retransmit, DropChunk} : action
    \/ \E chunk \in fileChunks : 
        /\ \E action \in {SendChunk, DropChunk} : action

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>
